nodes.label: Web App (Next.js)
nodes.summary: Next.js 15 frontend (App Router) for the Bodhi yoga studio. Server components fetch from Strapi via lib/api; client components use React Query.

nodes.label: CMS (Strapi)
nodes.summary: Strapi headless CMS exposing yoga-class, instructor, blog-post, and testimonial content types via REST API; PostgreSQL-backed.

nodes.label: Root Configs
nodes.summary: Monorepo root: package.json, docker-compose.yml, .env.example, README, .gitignore, skills-lock.json. Orchestrates the two apps.

nodes.label: Next.js App Router
nodes.summary: Next.js App Router root: layout.tsx wraps every page with Header/Footer/Providers; page.tsx is the home route. Page-level components delegate to feature components in src/components.

nodes.label: Home page (/)
nodes.summary: Home route. Composes Header, Hero, Features, ClassesPreview, Testimonials, CTA from components/home and components/layout.

nodes.label: About page (/about)
nodes.summary: About route — renders AboutContent component.

nodes.label: Blog index (/blog)
nodes.summary: Blog index route — renders BlogContent listing all posts.

nodes.label: Blog post (/blog/[slug])
nodes.summary: Dynamic blog post route. Generates metadata from slug and renders BlogPostContent.

nodes.label: Classes page (/classes)
nodes.summary: Classes listing route — renders ClassesContent.

nodes.label: Contact page (/contact)
nodes.summary: Contact route — renders ContactContent.

nodes.label: Instructors page (/instructors)
nodes.summary: Instructors listing route — renders InstructorsContent.

nodes.label: Web Components
nodes.summary: All React components grouped by feature: home, blog, classes, contact, instructors, layout, shared primitives, and shadcn ui. Most are client components using framer-motion.

nodes.label: Home components
nodes.summary: Home-page sections: hero, features, classes-preview, testimonials, cta. Each is a self-contained client component composed by app/page.tsx.

nodes.label: Blog components
nodes.summary: blog-content (index listing) and blog-post-content (single post). Currently uses inline mock data, not lib/api.

nodes.label: Classes components
nodes.summary: classes-content — the full UI for the /classes route.

nodes.label: Contact components
nodes.summary: contact-content — form and contact info for the /contact route.

nodes.label: Instructors components
nodes.summary: instructors-content — instructor profiles UI for /instructors.

nodes.label: Layout components
nodes.summary: Header (with nav + mobile sheet) and Footer. Mounted globally by app/layout.tsx.

nodes.label: Shared primitives
nodes.summary: Container (max-width wrapper) and SectionHeading. Reused across most feature components.

nodes.label: shadcn UI primitives
nodes.summary: shadcn/Radix primitives: badge, button, card, navigation-menu, separator, sheet. Generated via shadcn CLI (components.json).

nodes.label: About content (loose)
nodes.summary: Top-level component (not in a subfolder) rendering the /about route body.

nodes.label: Web lib
nodes.summary: Cross-cutting utilities: strapi (axios client), api (server-side fetchers), queries (React Query hooks), providers (QueryClientProvider), utils (cn classname helper).

nodes.label: Web types
nodes.summary: strapi.ts — TypeScript interfaces for StrapiResponse, StrapiImage, YogaClass, Instructor, BlogPost, Testimonial. Consumed by lib and components.

nodes.label: Web app configs
nodes.summary: next.config.ts, tsconfig.json, package.json, components.json (shadcn). Sets up Next.js, TS path alias @/, and shadcn registry.

nodes.label: CMS source
nodes.summary: Strapi runtime entry (src/index.ts with empty register/bootstrap/destroy hooks) and admin/app.ts customization stub. All content lives under src/api.

nodes.label: CMS API (content types)
nodes.summary: Strapi content-type APIs. Each type has a schema, controller, route, and service — all use factories.createCoreX defaults (no business logic overrides).

nodes.label: Blog Post content type
nodes.summary: Blog post collection: title/slug/body/cover image with draftAndPublish. CRUD via Strapi core controller/route/service.

nodes.label: Instructor content type
nodes.summary: Instructor profiles content type — schema + auto-generated controller/route/service.

nodes.label: Testimonial content type
nodes.summary: Student testimonial entries — schema + auto-generated controller/route/service.

nodes.label: Yoga Class content type
nodes.summary: Yoga class catalog (name/level/schedule/instructor relation) — schema + auto-generated controller/route/service.

nodes.label: Strapi configs
nodes.summary: Strapi runtime config: admin (JWT), api (REST prefix), database (Postgres from env), middlewares, plugins, server (host/port/keys). All env-driven.
